title: Hexa Boost 8dBi Fiberglass Antenna

test_results.notes: Tested with the lightning arrester in line ahead of the antenna. Does seem to impact performance based on this test.

description: 915 MHz fiberglass omni antenna, roughly 43.5" (1.1m) tall, rated 8 dBi with an N-Type female connector.
commentary: Solid antenna, though the price increase ($25->60) over the last 3 years is regrettable. A solid option for outdoor installs where high gain fits your needs. Remember though that 8dBi is a lot of gain, and you're likely better off sitting around 3-6. We generally steer people towards Rokland antennas in this price range.
